forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 58. Southwest wind around 3 mph.

forecast.name: Monday
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly sunny. High near 72, with temperatures falling to around 69 in the afternoon. West southwest wind 2 to 10 mph.

weather_report:
As night drapes its silken fabric over Downtown San Francisco, the atmosphere is predominantly cloudy, whispering promises of cooler dawns to come. Temperatures cradle gently around 58 degrees, with a soft southwest breeze stirring lazily. Yet, as the sun inches towards its ascent, anticipation builds in the air, paving the way for a partly sunny Monday. Expect a balmy high, teasing at 72 degrees, descending gracefully to 69 as the day unfurls its canvas, the west-southwest wind ushering in a mellow draft.

The allure of the day beckons travelers to experience the city in its shifting light. Although the expected marine layer may cloak the Golden Gate Bridge in playful veils, there remains an undeniable charm in the mild warmth that invites leisurely strolls along the Embarcadero or quiet moments in the park, perhaps with a book in hand. For an afternoon jaunt, a light jacket or a comfortable sweater would suit admirably, offering just enough warmth against any lingering nips from that familiar fog. Such tender weather calls for enjoying a local café, savoring craft coffee while observing the urban rhythms of life, where moments are gently wrapped in fog and sunlight alike.
